entity.summary: Cronos automated-market-maker decentralized exchange providing peer-to-peer token swaps, liquidity pools, and active spot-trading volume.
entity.notes: Current first-party Crodex application endpoint remains reachable. DefiLlama independently classifies Crodex as a Cronos AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and recent DEX volume. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party protocol documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Crodex official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Crodex application endpoint remains reachable and serves the JavaScript exchange interface.

evidence.title: Crodex metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Crodex as a Cronos AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and recent and cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: Crodex DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Crodex as a Cronos decentralized exchange.
